subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-11-17
subcodes.first_line: This is a blessed meeting, for these revered souls have come together in complete unity
subcodes.subjects: @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @coming-of-age; maturity of mankind, @progress only takes place within its own degree, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual transformation, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
